name: signature-substitution
description: Chain of length 2 where link[1]'s signature is replaced with an Ed25519 signature over unrelated canonical bytes (JCS of `{"unrelated":"payload"}`). The signature is still produced by the correct signing key (agent_a) but does not cover link[1]'s own canonical form. chain.length=2 ≤ max_depth=3 and validityWindow is current, so depth + validity pass; signature check fires before scope.
